_doc: Optional registry of public data sources (OSS dumps, community APIs, parser repos) per game. When a trustworthy source exists, you MAY seed the bundle from it instead of running the full extraction pipeline — still produce a valid bundle. Add entries as you discover them. This file ships empty by design: it is game-specific, not project-specific.

<game-slug>.repo: owner/name (for parser-repo, an OSS datamine you can reuse read-only)
<game-slug>.license: license of the source — respect it
<game-slug>.notes: how to use it; freshness caveats
